name: Brewgata x Inferno Matinée // AUTOMATON Live
description:
Cavern Deep is a slow, heavy band, founded 2019, by members from Zonaria and Swedish retro riffsters Gudars Skymning. The band released its first self-titled concept album through Interstellar Smoke Records and then went on to form their own record label called Bonebag Records, releasing their second album "Part II - Breach" to critical acclaim.

Their latest album “Part III - The Bodiless” is set to release the 9th of May 2025. It is the final entry in the concept album trilogy started with their debut album released in 2021. 

Free Entry with Festival Pass
250 nok Door for non festival

20. yo
